plugins.name: openclone
plugins.description: Create AI clones with categorized personas (vc, dev, founder, pm, designer, writer) and converse with them inside Claude Code. Activate a clone and every following message is answered in that clone's voice; call /oc-<category> for multi-perspective panels.
